allow: Bash(python3 -c " import json, sys with open\('/c/Users/PROTECH/.claude/projects/c--Users-PROTECH-Documents-app-samsara-backend-samsara-rms/478beda4-f469-44df-ac15-d99d50c2be71.jsonl'\) as f: lines = f.readlines\(\) for line in lines: try: obj = json.loads\(line\) msg = obj.get\('message', {}\) role = msg.get\('role', ''\) if role == 'user': content = msg.get\('content', ''\) if isinstance\(content, list\): for block in content: if isinstance\(block, dict\) and block.get\('type'\) == 'text': text = block.get\('text', ''\) if 'table' in text.lower\(\): print\('USER:', text[:300]\) print\('---'\) elif isinstance\(content, str\) and 'table' in content.lower\(\): print\('USER:', content[:300]\) print\('---'\) except: pass ")
